evidence_label: current curative evidence radar, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (thalassemia[Title/Abstract]) AND (2026[dp]) AND (gene therapy OR exagamglogene OR exa-cel OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR pyruvate kinase OR fetal hemoglobin OR BCL11A OR gamma-globin)
